svg.title: Exact calculation formulas for every derived metric
svg.desc: Flowchart showing step-by-step formulas for mistake inference, section score, AIR prediction, cutoff proximity, college probability, and recovery delta
svg.text: PM note: section_avg_time = total_section_time ÷ questions_attempted in that section, recalculated per mock.

g.text: NEET: neg_rate=1 · JEE MCQ: neg_rate=1 · JEE integer: neg_rate=0 · CLAT: neg_rate=0.25

svg.text: 3. AIR estimate — deterministic lookup, no AI
Weighted avg of 3 yrs: year_n × 0.5 + year_(n-1) × 0.3 + year_(n-2) × 0.2. Admin updates weights annually.

g.text: display: "+47 above cutoff" or "−23 below cutoff" in plain language

svg.text: PM critique: cutoff changes year to year. Always label as "vs [year] cutoff" and show 3-yr range as context band.

g.text: Step 4: clamp(raw_prob, 5, 95) — never show 0% or 100%, always honest
narrative: "You've recovered {recovered} marks. Average repeater: +40–60 marks."
